data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
if isinstance\(data, list\):
    for v in data:
        lang = v.get\('language',''\)
        name = v.get\('name',''\)
        vid = v.get\('id',''\)
        desc = v.get\('description',''\)[:60] if v.get\('description'\) else ''
        print\(f'{name:25s} | {lang:5s} | {vid} | {desc}'\)
elif isinstance\(data, dict\):
    print\(json.dumps\(data, indent=2\)[:2000]\)

Bash(source /c/Users/karri/OneDrive/Desktop/projects/livekits/.env 2>/dev/null; curl -s "https://api.cartesia.ai/voices" -H "X-API-Key: $CARTESIA_API_KEY" -H "Cartesia-Version: 2024-06-10" 2>&1 | python -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for v in sorted\(data, key=lambda x: x.get\('language',''\)\):
    lang = v.get\('language',''\)
    if lang in \('hi','te','en'\):
        name = v.get\('name',''\)
        vid = v.get\('id',''\)
        desc = v.get\('description',''\)[:80] if v.get\('description'\) else ''
        # Check for Indian accent in English voices
        if lang == 'en' and 'indian' not in \(desc+name\).lower\(\) and 'india' not in \(desc+name\).lower\(\):
            continue
        print\(f'{lang:4s} | {name:35s} | {vid} | {desc}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:8005/token?persona=priya" 2>&1 | python -c "
import sys, json, base64
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
token = data['token']
# JWT payload is the second part
payload = token.split\('.'\)[1]
# Add padding
payload += '=' * \(4 - len\(payload\) % 4\)
decoded = json.loads\(base64.b64decode\(payload\)\)
print\(json.dumps\(decoded, indent=2\)\)
")
